positive: A lush, highly detailed botanical arrangement featuring exotic tropical leaves (Monstera, Banana leaf) and vibrant orchids. Rendered in the style of a vintage scientific watercolor engraving, intricate cross-hatching, natural color palette, perfect for a nature-themed t-shirt.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, digital paint, harsh edges
